mapper.select: SELECT NOTICE_NO , NICKNAME , NOTICE_TITLE , NOTICE_CONTENT , COUNT , NB.CREATE_DATE , NB.MODIFY_DATE FROM NOTICE_BOARD LEFT JOIN PLU_USER PU ON(NB.USER_ID = PU.USER_ID) WHERE NB.STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{pi.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pi.boardLimit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTICE_BOARD WHERE STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE_BOARD SET COUNT = COUNT + 1 WHERE STATUS = 'Y' AND NOTICE_NO= #{noticeNo}
mapper.select: SELECT NOTICE_NO , NICKNAME , NOTICE_TITLE , NOTICE_CONTENT , COUNT , NB.CREATE_DATE , NB.MODIFY_DATE FROM NOTICE_BOARD LEFT JOIN PLU_USER PU ON(NB.USER_ID = PU.USER_ID) WHERE NB.STATUS = 'Y' AND NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo}
